build.beforeBuildCommand: cd ../.. && node scripts/sync-project-mirror.mjs --check && cd frontend && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: https: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: LLM-driven Galgame engine and authoring workbench.
bundle.longDescription: Monogatari is an LLM-driven visual novel and text-adventure engine with character knowledge, scoring, workflow authoring, renderer asset pipelines, and Web/PWA distribution.
